web.title: A family story - Concettina ai Tre Santi
web.description: The Olivas' pizzeria opened its doors in 1951. Just like many women in the quarters of Naples, Concettina deep-fried her pizzas right on the street corner.

web.title: Concettina ai Tre Santi - Capri Restaurants - Tripadvisor
web.description: La Pizzeria degli Oliva nasce nel 1951.Come molte donne dei quartieri di Napoli, anche Concettina friggeva all'angolo di strada le sue pizze.

web.title: Locations - Concettina ai Tre Santi
web.description: A place to be · Naples and the Sanità quarter permeate the pizzeria with their colours and fragrances · Capri: an island between fairy-tale and ancient culture.
